headline: What to Expect From ConocoPhillips' Q2 2026 Earnings Report
summary: ConocoPhillips is expected to unveil its second-quarter results next month, and analysts are projecting a triple-digit rise in profit.

headline: Susquehanna Maintains Positive on ConocoPhillips, Raises Price Target to $155
summary: Susquehanna  analyst Biju Perincheril   maintains ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) with a Positive and raises the price target from $152 to $155.
